markdown:
# Opal: Screen Time Control · Productivity

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:45 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      22 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 8, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Wvoqfent_, Jun 26, 2026, 1/5: "After the latest update, the app is very slow and does not block the apps even when rules are active. Please fix it!"
            2. _machitivuole_, Jul 9, 2026, 2/5: "The last update has made this app so much worse than it was!! So many things were changed that didn’t need to be changed and it’s overall so glitchy now. Moreover the push notifications have become so annoying (and way too frequent). 😔😔😔"
            3. _Rezensionentipper_, Jul 2, 2026, 2/5: "I was using Opal for more than a year and it was fantastic! Now with the Update it is just lagging when trying to pause, draining battery and also not blocking properly. This is still going on, so unfortunately I have to remove the app. I would appreciate the version before the update or if all the issues are fixed but as of now, this is not the best UX. Good luck!"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 22, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _aafjdbjtgnkiiloolklll_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "App works great, but for 100€ a year the devs are greedy jews. Literally kill yourselves like wtf. I don’t know what degenerates actually pay for this. If it was 100€ to buy premium for life - i’d do it. BUT A SUBSCRIPTION MODEL 😭😭😭🙏🏻 Kys nigga wtf"
            2. _Moe8206_, Jun 26, 2026, 1/5: "SEE UPDATE BELOW PLS! Opal is one of the best desicions I made this year, it helps me concentrate on the important things (studying, work, sport, etc) in life and to end constant procrastination and distraction through social media. Even if you for once really need to use your social media accounts or just need a short break it offers useful short break timers. The app is highly costomizable which is a huge +. The only negative part is the unnecessary very high (yearly or monthly) subscription prize for the PRO version that offers even more features. 99€/ year for such an simple app is just a bit too much. In conclusion however I definitely recommend Opal to anyone that struggels with a high screen time. :) UPDATE JUNE 2026 After the most recent update the app is laggy and awfully unusable. Please change this!"
            3. _Alice.Ttt_, Jun 22, 2026, 2/5: "In the new version for IPhones rules don’t work for websites. That feature was important for me and I want to cancel the subscription"
